//: Lighthouse-CI assertions — ADR 0045 Beslut 2 (Core Web Vitals).
//runs: numberOfRuns:3 + median — single-run composite-score är dokumenterat flaky (web-verifierat 2026-05-17). Median stabiliserar lab-LCP under tröskeln.
//gate: Jobbet är observe-only Fas 1 (build.yml: ej i ci.needs, continue-on-error). Assertion-severity nedan är RATCHET-INTENT, inte Fas-1-blockering. Flip till blockerande = medveten ratchet vid Klas-GO (ADR 0045 Beslut 6).

collect.//urls: b6/m6 (#755): root + public marketing-inner (matchning, cv-granskning, hjalpcenter, for-utvecklare) + guest mirrors (gast/jobb, gast/oversikt, gast/cv). All backend-free under `pnpm start` (guest mirrors are mock-data, marketing-inner is static content) so the observe-only CI job needs no seeded stack. The guest mirrors exercise the same layout/bundle surfaces as the authed pages (i18n payload, wizard/CSS bundles) where the audit's bundle findings concentrate. Authed pages are a follow-up gated on TD-89's seeded CI stack (LHCI puppeteerScript form-login with the dev-test account, NOT committed here). numberOfRuns(3) runs per URL, so the collect phase scales ~linearly with URL count (1 -> 8 URLs is ~8x the collect time); the job stays observe-only (continue-on-error, not in ci.needs) so this never extends the blocking critical path.

assertions.//inp: INP är field-metrik; lab approximerar via TBT. ADR 0045: observe-only (warn).
assertions.//score: Composite perf-score: observe-only (loggas, ej assert) — ADR 0045 Beslut 2.
